item.title: RuleML Call for Papers
item.description: The submission deadline for the RuleML 2015 is approaching. The annual International Web Rule Symposium (RuleML) is an “international conference on research, applications, languages and standards for rule technologies”. RuleML 2015 takes place from August 2-5, 2015, at the Free University of Berlin, in Berlin, Germany.

item.title: New Website and Blog
item.description: This will be my new personal website, hosted on Github. This is work in progress. When it is ready, I will redirect my tfgordon.de domain name to point here.
